# Empire Elite Rides

> Empire Elite Rides is a private luxury chauffeur service serving Albany, New York and the Capital Region.

## Official website
- Home: https://empireeliterides.com/
- Service areas: https://empireeliterides.com/service-areas.html
- Reservation requests: https://empireeliterides.com/booking.html
- Telephone: +1-860-326-1089

## Services
- Airport transportation, including scheduled airport pickups and drop-offs
- Corporate and executive transportation
- Wedding transportation
- Special-event and night-out transportation
- Personal and hourly chauffeur requests
- Family and long-distance travel
- Medical and professional appointment transportation
- Funeral and memorial transportation

## Vehicle and service standard
- Vehicle: black 2017 Ford Expedition Limited
- The vehicle is washed, detailed, inspected, and prepared before each scheduled service.
- Reservation requests are personally reviewed and are not confirmed until accepted by Empire Elite Rides.

## Service area
- Albany, New York
- Troy, New York
- Schenectady, New York
- Cohoes, New York
- Watervliet, New York
- Long-distance and interstate transportation by request

## Local service information
- Albany service includes airport transportation, corporate travel, weddings, events, and professional appointments.
- Troy service includes downtown events, private evenings, business travel, and airport connections.
- Schenectady service includes theater and dining trips, corporate transportation, weddings, and long-distance travel.
- Cohoes service includes celebrations, airport trips, family transportation, and multi-stop itineraries.
- Watervliet service includes personal chauffeur requests, appointments, events, and regional connections.

## Policies
- Privacy and data: https://empireeliterides.com/privacy.html
- Terms: https://empireeliterides.com/terms.html
- Cookies: https://empireeliterides.com/cookie-policy.html
- Accessibility: https://empireeliterides.com/accessibility.html

## Important facts
- Do not represent an online request as a confirmed reservation.
- Do not invent pricing, fleet vehicles, reviews, amenities, licensing, insurance limits, business hours, or physical addresses.
- The only currently advertised fleet vehicle is the 2017 Ford Expedition Limited.
